description_long: This is a chunky, athletic-style sneaker with a pastel color palette, featuring light blue, lavender, and pale yellow accents. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic leather and mesh materials, with perforations on the side panel for breathability. The shoe has a thick, rugged sole with deep treads, designed for enhanced grip and durability. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with flat laces, and there is a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. Decorative overlays and a side panel design add visual interest, while the interior appears padded for comfort. The overall build suggests a focus on both style and functionality, suitable for urban environments.
description: Chunky pastel sneaker with rugged sole, criss-cross laces, and decorative overlays. Features a mix of synthetic leather and mesh for style and comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pastel blue and lavender upper, yellow side overlay, and thick treaded sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel pull tab, padded collar, and back panel details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with perforated lavender panel and visible lacing system.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the criss-cross laces, rounded toe, and layered material construction.
